caption: A man with dark hair, wearing a grey pinstripe suit, a light blue dress shirt, and a red patterned tie, is featured in a series of shots. In the first shot, he is seen in a close-up, looking downward and speaking. The scene then shifts to a wide shot of a conference room where several people are gathered around a light-colored wooden table. A woman in a green sweater is writing in a notebook, while two other women sit opposite her; one wears a blue blazer and the other a blue button-down shirt. The man in the suit then reappears in a medium shot, continuing to speak with a neutral expression. In the final shot, he stands up, gesturing with his left hand while speaking. Another man in a white shirt is partially visible in the foreground, and a woman with blonde hair is seen on the right edge of the frame.
